title: xanthophyllum angustigemma
intro: Xanthophyllum angustigemma is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the xanthophyllum or mangrove polygala. The plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asian cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum angustigemma include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts that are used to treat various health conditions.
